description: Clean-room phase-scoped semantics contract for the exported phase-1 setjmp/sigsetjmp/longjmp/siglongjmp ABI surface with explicit backend-debt caveats.

abi_semantics_matrix.strict_semantics: Exported phase-1 capture entrypoint with metadata tracking and no hidden stack rewrites.
abi_semantics_matrix.hardened_semantics: Same capture path with additional validation context; hardened mode does not claim different control-transfer semantics.

abi_semantics_matrix.strict_semantics: Exported phase-1 restore entrypoint with validation and explicit deferred backend termination contract.
abi_semantics_matrix.hardened_semantics: Same exported restore path; hardened mode validates metadata but does not advertise hidden recovery beyond the deferred backend contract.

abi_semantics_matrix.strict_semantics: Exported phase-1 alias for setjmp capture without signal-mask save.
abi_semantics_matrix.hardened_semantics: Same exported alias path; no hardened-specific divergence is claimed.
abi_semantics_matrix.signal_mask_semantics: Must not save signal mask when implemented.

abi_semantics_matrix.strict_semantics: Exported phase-1 alias for longjmp restore with the same deferred backend termination contract.
abi_semantics_matrix.hardened_semantics: Same exported alias path; hardened mode does not claim additional restore repair semantics.
abi_semantics_matrix.signal_mask_semantics: Must not restore signal mask when implemented.

abi_semantics_matrix.strict_semantics: Exported phase-1 POSIX capture variant with explicit savemask tracking.
abi_semantics_matrix.hardened_semantics: Same exported capture path with validation metadata; no hidden signal-mask repair semantics are claimed.
abi_semantics_matrix.signal_mask_semantics: Must save signal mask iff savemask != 0.

abi_semantics_matrix.strict_semantics: Exported phase-1 POSIX restore variant with signal-mask restore metadata and deferred backend termination contract.
abi_semantics_matrix.hardened_semantics: Same exported restore path; hardened mode validates metadata before the deferred backend boundary.
abi_semantics_matrix.signal_mask_semantics: Must restore saved mask iff originating sigsetjmp used savemask != 0.

pairing_rules: sigsetjmp(env, savemask != 0) MUST save caller signal mask and mark env as mask-bearing.
sigsetjmp(env, savemask == 0) MUST NOT save caller signal mask.
siglongjmp(env, val) MUST restore signal mask only when env is mask-bearing.
setjmp/longjmp and _setjmp/_longjmp MUST NOT mutate signal mask state.
signal_mask_contract.phase1_enforcement: Setjmp-family symbols are exported in phase-1, but backend transfer semantics remain explicitly debt-scoped and waiver-backed until the backend implementation wave closes.

phase1_non_goals: No claim of async-signal-safe non-local jump behavior.
No claim of cross-thread jump support.
No claim of stack-unwind interoperability with C++ exceptions or cancellation.
No claim that the exported restore entrypoints already perform a full production backend transfer.
safety_constraints: Never perform hidden stack rewrites from safe core code.
Any future jump-buffer parsing must include explicit integrity checks before restore.
Signal-mask semantics must be deterministic and pairwise-testable per env instance.
Support matrix must not advertise setjmp-family availability before fixture and guard gates pass.

user_visible_notes: setjmp-family symbols are currently visible in the support matrix as phase-1 exported shadow implementations.
The exported restore path still carries explicit backend debt and remains guarded by waiver policy until implementation beads close.
Users should treat the current setjmp family as phase-1 semantics with backend caveats, not as a fully closed production transfer implementation.
